main.description: A singleton summary of Dame's whole iNaturalist observing activity, mirrored from iNaturalist. Doubles as the incremental mirror's freshness marker across every observation (moths included). Contains no location data.

source.description: Origin of the mirrored data, e.g. 'inaturalist'.

user.description: The iNaturalist username the data was mirrored from.

observationCount.description: Non-moth observations mirrored under the observing verb.

distinctTaxaCount.description: Distinct non-moth taxa at any rank.

qualityGrades.description: Non-moth observation counts by iNaturalist quality grade.

iconicTaxa.description: Non-moth observation counts by iNaturalist iconic taxon (Aves, Plantae, Insecta…), most first.

earliestDate.description: Date of the earliest non-moth observation (YYYY-MM-DD).

latestDate.description: Date of the most recent non-moth observation (YYYY-MM-DD).

syncTotalCount.description: Total iNaturalist observation count across every taxon (moths + everything else); the incremental mirror's freshness signature.

lastSyncedAt.description: UTC instant of the most recent upstream edit seen across all observations; the incremental mirror's freshness marker.
